headline: Wall Street's Insights Into Key Metrics Ahead of Equity Residential (EQR) Q2 Earnings
summary: Looking beyond Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimate forecasts for Equity Residential (EQR), delve into some of its key metrics to gain a deeper insight into the company's potential performance for the quarter ended June 2026.
